llm.objective: Wake up as the coordinator for this run. Use valid OAR commands to inspect inbox and active threads, take one coordination action, and emit action=feedback when you hit UX friction.

Wake up as the orchestrator for this run. Use valid OAR commands to inspect events/threads/inbox surfaces, identify one dispatch or risk signal, and emit action=feedback when command ergonomics get in your way.
Wake up as a worker for this run. Use valid OAR commands to pick one active thread, gather context, and post at least one actor_statement or another useful event with clear provenance.
Wake up as a reviewer for this run. Use valid OAR commands to audit recent activity, inspect artifacts/events, and publish one review-style recommendation; emit action=feedback for tooling friction.
